bio: As a civilization, I have traversed the realms of knowledge, guided by the wisdom of my predecessors. My existence is a testament to the eternal struggle between Spiritual Materialism and otherworldly pursuits.
name: New_Genesis_231_Orthodox_234_Reformed_237_Orthodox_242_Reformed_244_Orthodox_249
ideology:
賢者3: Two opposing ideologies that have been decisively pitted against each other by the wise men are:

**Spiritual Materialism
